name: Cucked by Campus

A regular reset after games and parties, a familiar body in a place where everything was new. He kept things casual and he knew how to arrange a gangbang for her.

Rosie told herself it was temporary, that she’d stop after college. She told herself she could be your perfect girlfriend on the phone and still be a different girl when nobody was watching.
